# Step 2: Plan implementation

<!-- source: 07-ai-powered-analysis-workflows.qmd section "Plan implementation and project structure"
     (directory structure, README-as-agent-memory concept — the full spec sheet example
     is deferred to module 04 in this section) -->

Turning a chosen method into a project plan: directory structure and the README as the agent's memory.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge drafting a directory structure for a new benthic/fish analysis project.
:::
